abort.already_configured: Tinxy is already configured. You can manage your devices from the integration page.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Tinxy service. Please check your network and try again.
error.invalid_auth: The API key provided is invalid. Please verify it in the Tinxy mobile app.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or check the logs for details.

user.title: Connect to Tinxy
user.description: Enter your Tinxy API key to get started. You can find this in the Tinxy mobile app under Settings.
